utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , come on , I can not get married until I get something old , something new , something borrowed , and something blue .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , all right , all right , all right ! Okay ! Okay , here is something , here is something blue and new .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You are so efficient . I love you !
